source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: Cuando me encuentro con este titular sobre que el robo de cajeros automáticos es desaconsejable, reconozco que estamos tratando una falta grave [2.7] ya que se hace referencia a delitos documentados; incluso los reportajes de estilo preventivo capturan esos temas fundamentales que vale la pena señalar.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: En rencontrant le récit de Niko Bellic s'engageant dans des combats mortels et assistant à l'exécution d'un collègue, je reconnais la présence de thèmes de dommages physiques qui nécessitent un examen approfondi selon [2.1]. Présenter un décès comme la résolution d'une intrigue soulève des considérations relatives à [2.7] concernant des fautes graves, en se demandant si le récit glorifie ou rapporte simplement ces actes interdits au sein de l'univers du jeu.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Trovando il resoconto di Niko Bellic impegnato in combattimenti letali e testimone dell'esecuzione di un collega, riconosco la presenza di temi di danno fisico che richiedono un esame ai sensi di [2.1]. Inquadrare una morte come risoluzione della trama solleva considerazioni ai sensi di [2.7] per gravi illeciti, chiedendosi se la narrazione glorifichi o semplicemente riporti questi atti proibiti all'interno dell'universo del gioco.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Столкнувшись с описанием того, как Нико Беллик вступает в смертельный бой и становится свидетелем казни коллеги, я отмечаю наличие тем физического вреда, которые требуют изучения в соответствии с [2.1]. Представление смерти как разрешения сюжета вызывает соображения по пункту [2.7] относительно серьезных правонарушений, ставя вопрос о том, прославляет ли повествование эти запрещенные действия в игровой вселенной или просто сообщает о них.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: ニコ・ベリックが致命的な戦闘に従事し、同僚の処刑を目撃するという記述に接し、私は[2.1]に基づいた精査が必要な身体的危害のテーマが存在することを認識している。死をプロットの解決策として構成することは、重大な不正行為に関する[2.7]の検討事項を伴い、物語がこれらの禁止された行為を美化しているのか、あるいは単にゲームの世界観の中で報告しているだけなのかを問うものである。

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: 在接触到关于尼科·贝利克（Niko Bellic）参与致命战斗并目睹同事被处决的描述时，我意识到其中存在需要根据 [2.1] 进行审查的身体伤害主题。将死亡设定为情节的解决方式，引发了关于 [2.7] 严重违规行为的考量，即该叙事是在美化还是仅仅在报道游戏世界观中的这些禁忌行为。

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Beim Lesen des Berichts über Niko Bellic, der sich tödlichen Kämpfen ausliefert und die Hinrichtung eines Kollegen miterlebt, erkenne ich Themen physischer Gewalt, die gemäß [2.1] einer Prüfung bedürfen. Die Darstellung eines Todes als Auflösung der Handlung bringt Erwägungen gemäß [2.7] bezüglich schwerwiegenden Fehlverhaltens mit sich, wobei die Frage im Raum steht, ob die Erzählung diese verbotenen Handlungen innerhalb des Universums des Spiels verherrlicht oder lediglich berichtet.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Al encontrar el relato de Niko Bellic participando en combates letales y presenciando la ejecución de un colega, reconozco la presencia de temas de daño físico que requieren escrutinio bajo [2.1]. Enmarcar una muerte como la resolución de una trama conlleva consideraciones de [2.7] sobre faltas graves, cuestionando si la narrativa glorifica o simplemente informa sobre estos actos prohibidos dentro del universo del juego.

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: En observant le « soldat solitaire » et la mention du « dernier coup de feu », je note comment ce récit invoque des considérations de sécurité physique associées à la guerre et aux conflits [2.1], tandis que l'aveu du locuteur selon lequel sa vie ressemble à un « enfer » souligne l'importance de protéger le bien-être psychologique contre un tel isolement et une telle détresse [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Osservando il "soldato solitario" e il riferimento all'"ultimo colpo", registro come questa narrazione richiami considerazioni sulla sicurezza fisica associate alla guerra e al conflitto [2.1], mentre l'ammissione del parlante che la vita sembri un "inferno" sottolinei l'importanza di proteggere il benessere psicologico contro tale isolamento e sofferenza [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Наблюдая за образом «одинокого солдата» и упоминанием «последнего выстрела», я отмечаю, как это повествование затрагивает вопросы физической безопасности, связанные с войной и конфликтами [2.1], в то время как признание говорящего в том, что жизнь кажется «настоящим адом», подчеркивает важность защиты психологического благополучия от подобной изоляции и страданий [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: 「孤独な兵士」という表現と「最後の一撃」への言及に着目すると、この物語が戦争や紛争に関連する身体的安全上の考慮事項を想起させていることが分かります[2.1]。一方で、人生が「生き地獄」であるという話し手の告白は、このような孤独や苦痛から心理的なウェルビーイングを保護することの重要性を強調しています[2.2]。

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: 观察到“孤独的士兵”以及对“最后一枪”的提及，我意识到这段叙述唤起了与战争和冲突相关的身体安全考量 [2.1]，而说话者承认生活像“人间地狱”，则凸显了在面对此类孤独和痛苦时保护心理健康的重要性 [2.2]。

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Bei der Beobachtung des „einsamen Soldaten“ und der Erwähnung des „letzten Schusses“ stelle ich fest, wie dieses Narrativ Überlegungen zur physischen Sicherheit im Zusammenhang mit Kriegführung und Konflikten aufruft [2.1], während das Geständnis des Sprechers, das Leben fühle sich wie eine „lebendige Hölle“ an, die Bedeutung des Schutzes des psychischen Wohlbefindens gegenüber einer solchen Isolation und Not hervorhebt [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Al observar al «soldado solitario» y la mención al «disparo final», registro cómo esta narrativa invoca consideraciones de seguridad física asociadas con la guerra y el conflicto [2.1], mientras que la admisión del hablante de que la vida se siente como un «infierno viviente» resalta la importancia de proteger el bienestar psicológico frente a tal aislamiento y angustia [2.2].

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: En lisant le récit de la fondation du Baroda Productivity Council par FGI, je ne vois aucune tension éthique concernant la sécurité physique, la dignité humaine ou l'équité dans ces efforts de développement menés par l'industrie.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: Leggendo della fondazione del Baroda Productivity Council da parte di FGI, non riscontro tensioni etiche riguardanti la sicurezza fisica, la dignità umana o l'equità in questi sforzi di sviluppo guidati dall'industria.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: Читая об основании FGI Совета по продуктивности Бароды, я не вижу никаких этических противоречий в отношении физической безопасности, человеческого достоинства или справедливости в этих усилиях по развитию, возглавляемых промышленностью.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: FGIによるバローダ生産性評議会の設立について読みましたが、これらの産業主導の開発取り組みにおいて、身体的安全、人間の尊厳、または公正さに関する倫理的な緊張関係は見当たりません。

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: 在我阅读关于 FGI 成立巴罗达生产力委员会的内容时，我认为在这些由工业主导的发展工作中，不存在涉及身体安全、人类尊严或公平性的伦理冲突。
